# Buildwise Media

## About
Buildwise Media is an AI-native marketing agency that builds complete marketing engines for service businesses. 85% of production is automated through AI with quality gates at every step.

## Services
- **Ascend** — Full-service AI marketing engine: custom website, content production, paid ads management, AI business tools, strategy & analytics, brand identity. $5,999/month. Month-to-month contract.
- **Ascend Lite** — Lead generation foundation: sales funnel, paid ads management, strategy, analytics, brand foundation. $3,500/month. Month-to-month contract.

## Service Area
United States (remote-first)

## Location
Buildwise Media LLC
11720 Amber Park Dr Ste 160 PMB 1232
Alpharetta, Georgia 30009

## Contact
Email: hello@buildwisemedia.com
Website: https://buildwisemedia.com

## Booking
Book a strategy call: https://book.buildwisemedia.com/bwm/strategy-call
Duration: 15 minutes
Cost: Free

## Key Differentiators
- Month-to-month contract. No long-term lock-in.
- Client owns everything — website, content, ad accounts, data.
- 85% AI-automated production with 8/10 quality threshold.
- Every website scores 90+ on Google PageSpeed.
- 71 documented processes.
- 6 types of schema markup on every page.

## Pricing
- Ascend: $5,999/month + one-time Engine Build fee + ad spend (separate)
- Ascend Lite: $3,500/month + ad spend (separate)
